priceUpdate: SOL is +6.6% in the last 24h and +6.3% over the last 7 days, while sentiment is still extreme fear. That keeps the setup tradable, but not stable yet. 24h volume is about $6.15B, which shows active trading. The key question is whether buyers keep rotating into Solana instead of back into BTC and ETH. Near-term direction depends on whether AI agents headlines turn into real usage (wallets, swaps, borrowing), led by Liquidity floods Solana as SOL reclaims EMA Ribbon to hit $85.
thisWeek: The lead setup this week is Liquidity floods Solana as SOL reclaims EMA Ribbon to hit $85 – Details, with traders now reacting to specific Solana headlines. Next up is Bitcoin touches $70,000 before fading as altcoins lead the strongest bounce in weeks. These stories only matter if they drive measurable usage, borrowing, and trading depth. Watch wallet growth, swaps, and perps depth around AI agents first.
nextWeek: Into next week, keep State of Marinade Q4 2025 on watch because it can pull incremental institutional and trading flow into the Solana complex. If that flow broadens beyond one headline, trend quality usually improves. If not, expect rotation and chop instead of continuation.
whatsHot: What's hot: ai agents, yield, new products are getting the highest share of Solana headlines right now.
